title: PaymentGateway output affects OrderService and InvoiceGenerator
description: PaymentGateway processes payment results that are consumed by OrderService for order fulfillment and InvoiceGenerator for receipt creation
blind_spot: Modifying payment result structure only considers PaymentGateway internals
violation_consequence: OrderService fails to process orders, InvoiceGenerator generates corrupt invoices

title: EventBus uses synchronous dispatch intentionally
description: EventBus dispatches events synchronously despite async being available to ensure ordering guarantees
blind_spot: Developer may convert to async for performance without understanding ordering requirement
violation_consequence: Event ordering breaks, causing race conditions in dependent handlers

title: UserSession flows through auth pipeline with validity window
description: UserSession data is only valid during request lifecycle, cached in RequestContext
blind_spot: Accessing UserSession outside request lifecycle returns stale data
violation_consequence: Stale session data causes permission check failures

title: DatabaseMigration must complete before SchemaValidator runs
description: SchemaValidator reads the schema version set by DatabaseMigration
blind_spot: Reordering init sequence seems safe but breaks schema validation
violation_consequence: SchemaValidator reads old schema version, reports false errors

title: ConnectionPool uses lock-free ConcurrentQueue
description: ConnectionPool chose ConcurrentQueue over simple List for thread safety
blind_spot: Replacing ConcurrentQueue with List for simplicity introduces race conditions
violation_consequence: Connection leaks and double-disposal under concurrent access
